Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class IntegrationProviderAttr

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.IntegrationProviderAttr
public class IntegrationProviderAttr extends Object

Java class for IntegrationProviderAttr complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="IntegrationProviderAttr">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="dataType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}AttrDataType"/>
         <element name="dateTimeValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="dateValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}date" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="developerName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="doubleValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="integerValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="percentageValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="required" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="stringValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="trueOrFalseValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
